impacts.description: Contribution to the Apply AI Strategy, advancing European capacity to deploy and apply next-generation AI agent technologies across key economic sectors.
Deployment of validated AI agent results via the European Digital Innovation Hubs (EDIHs), enabling broad industrial and public-sector adoption of next-generation AI agent capabilities.
Advancement of European open strategic autonomy in digital and emerging AI technologies, reducing dependency on non-European AI systems and platforms.
impacts.inference_note: Derived from the stated destination 'Achieving open strategic autonomy in digital and emerging enabling technologies (2026-27)' which is the overarching impact objective of the parent cluster call under which this topic is placed. Open strategic autonomy is the stated goal of the destination; next-generation AI agents directly serve this goal as established by the call framing.

impacts.description: Real-world AI agent applications enabling innovation in high-value Apply AI sectors: healthcare, advanced manufacturing, and in-vehicle autonomous driving.
Scientific progress in AI agent research shared with the European R&D community through the AI-on-demand platform, strengthening the European AI research and innovation ecosystem.
